articles.author: Yashraj Sharma
articles.title: Did Iran launch missiles at US-UK base on Diego Garcia? Here’s what to know - Al Jazeera
articles.description: UK condemns what it says is Iranian attack on airbase in Indian Ocean, but Tehran denies it carried out the launches.
articles.content:
The United Kingdom has slammed reckless Iranian threats after missiles targeted a joint United States-UK military base located on the Indian Ocean island of Diego Garcia.
